name: WHONE
short_description: Collect the Hidden Gems, Survive the Treacherous Levels, and Upgrade Your Abilities as You Jump Your Way to Victory! But WATCH-OUT, if You Touch the Ground, You DIE!
detailed_description:
Key Features

PLAY AS THE JUMPY-ADVENTURING MAGICAL DRAGON, WHONE!
Use your skills to parkour, jump, hop, and boost your way to the VOLCANO!!!

PARKOUR

With a large number of jumps on hand, WHONE can leap vast distances!

PUZZLES & CHALLENGES

Our open world design creates a plethora of challenges and puzzles to concur!

EVADE DANGER

You'll have to outwit and out-maneuver dangerous Traps, Challenges, and Hidden Events in the landscape.

ESCAPE ENEMIES

Always be on the look out for those pesky light-soul enemies, they're always on guard and have a few tricks up their sleeves.

ECONOMY

Invest your points into Ability Gems and Special Upgrades scattered in hidden shops!


About the Game

Attempting to put the Platformer back into Adventure Platformers, WHONE is a 3D Adventure Platformer set in a fantasy universe full of choices. While adventuring, you'll play as the whimsical magical dragon, WHONE, tasked with helping find his friends in an open world environment. Designed to keep you on your toes, explore hidden shops, frozen lakes, dangerous volcanos, and forgotten caverns, all while NEVER touching the ground.
